title: The JFTC holds the 20th Bilateral Meeting with the KFTC
text:
July 18/2013 Japan Fair Trade Commission 
 　The Japan Fair Trade Commission (JFTC) has regularly held bilateral meetings on competition policy with competition authorities in other jurisdictions for the purpose of building the cooperative relationship and promoting the mutual understanding. 
 　The JFTC will hold the 20th bilateral meeting with the Korea Fair Trade Commission (KFTC) as follows. JFTC-KFTC meetings have been held since 1990. 
 1. Date: July 19, 2013 
 2. Venue: Seoul, Korea 
 3. Participants: 
 JFTC Chairman Kazuyuki Sugimoto and other officials 
 KFTC Chairman Dae-lae Noh and other officials 
 4. Agenda: 
 1)　Recent developments in competition policy and cases 
 2)　Abuse of superior bargaining power 
 3)　International cooperation 

 Full Text(PDF : 8KB)
